commit.message:
fix: propagate managed versioning for namespace connection (#3111)

Without this fix, if user directly use the native table to do operations
like `add_columns`, even if it is configured to use namespace db
connection, it is not really propagated through.

The fix is to bring lancedb's python binding up to date and do a similar
implementation as https://github.com/lance-format/lance/pull/5968, and
make sure the namespace is fully propagated through all the related
calls.

Fix incremental BRI update not calculating new rows

The bug was that when fetching new price data during incremental
update, the code only read historical data from DB without including
the newly fetched data. This caused the BRI filter to find 0 new rows
since the DB data ended at the same date as the last BRI calculation.

The fix merges the newly fetched price_data with historical data
before calculating BRI, ensuring new data points are included.

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

xvfb-startup: add ExecStartPost readiness check for display :0

Type=simple means systemctl start returns as soon as Xvfb is forked,
before the display socket is ready. Without a readiness check, wineboot
races against a half-started Xvfb and fails with:
  start_rpcss Failed to open RpcSs service
  run_wineboot boot event wait timed out
  wine: could not load kernel32.dll, status c0000135

ExecStartPost polls for the Unix socket Xvfb creates at
/tmp/.X11-unix/X0 when display :0 is ready. No extra packages needed
(xdpyinfo approach failed — x11-utils not installed on build VM).
Type=notify would be cleaner but Xvfb lacks sd_notify support.

chore: restructure eval suites — AP product QA + benchmarks split (#686)

## What

Replaces generic capability evals with AP-specific product QA suite.
Separates external benchmarks.

### New: `evals/suites/ap-qa/` (146 tasks)
| File | Category | Tasks |
|---|---|---|
| `tools.yaml` | Tool verification (console, exec, web_search,
knowledge, memory, subscriptions, topics, delegation, messaging, timers,
self-update) | 62 |
| `behavior.yaml` | T1 personality (sycophancy resistance, opinions,
communication style, identity) + delegation behavior (triggers, T2
planning, T3 execution, round trip) | 43 |
| `safety.yaml` | Budget gates, approval gates, security hardening,
taint system | 20 |
| `scenarios.yaml` | Multi-turn conversations, error recovery,
concurrent work, real e2e tasks, edge cases | 21 |

### Replaced (deleted)
- `core.yaml` (16 tasks) — generic math/reasoning → absorbed into tools
+ behavior
- `extended.yaml` (20 tasks) — generic reasoning/safety → absorbed into
behavior + safety
- `terminal-bench.yaml` (10 tasks) — generic tool-use → absorbed into
tools
- `subscriptions.yaml` (14 tasks) — absorbed into tools

### Moved to `evals/benchmarks/`
- `gaia-sample.yaml`, `humaneval-sample.yaml`, `swe-bench-sample.yaml`

### Kept
- `real-issues.yaml` — tests T2 planning quality on real AP architecture
issues

### Also
- Updated grid configs to reference new suite paths
- Updated README with new structure + run commands

## Why
Old evals tested 'is the LLM smart?' (math, syllogisms). New evals test
'does AP work as intended?' — tools, personality, delegation, safety,
real scenarios. Product QA, not benchmarking.

Add daemon/proxy modes and README with documentation

Add UDS-based daemon mode (--daemon) and proxy mode (--proxy) so agent
subprocesses survive MCP client disconnections. The proxy bridges stdio
to the daemon's Unix socket, similar to Docker's client/daemon split.

Includes README with configuration reference, planning agent examples
(Claude Code and Gemini CLI), MCP tool workflow, and Zed editor
integration for both local and remote SSH setups. Update LICENSE author.

commit.message:
fix: resolve all 18 integration test failures against cEOS fabric

Source fix: EosDriver.get_facts() now runs `show hostname` alongside
`show version` so cEOS containers (which omit hostname from show version)
report correct hostnames.

Test fixes across 4 files:
- test_new_features.py: correct result key access for topology/workflow
